name: CLX - Admin Smart Quote Flow v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: Admin-gated multi-action endpoint for the Smart Quote question-flow page. Body: { action, industry_slug, draft_id?, answers?, email?, full_name?, company?, phone?, step?, addons?, preview_monthly_cents?, preview_total_cents? }. Actions: load_template | start_draft | save_step | submit.
